backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a snack ordering system with catalog management, shopping cart functionality, checkout with tip support, order tracking, and bank account storage using Map-based state and blob storage for images.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features related to debugging and fixing the ImageUpload component and its integration with the Admin page snack creation form.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files for the food truck snack ordering application with admin functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode design tokens for a warm food truck theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application titled 'Chosen One Tri-State Snack on the Go' with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin pages), ThemeProvider, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item display component showing product thumbnail, name, price, quantity, and calculated subtotal in a card layout.
frontend/src/components/ImageUpload.tsx: Reusable image upload component with file validation, preview, upload progress tracking, error handling with retry functionality, and ExternalBlob creation with state callbacks to parent components.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header, logo, navigation buttons (About, Cart, and admin-only links for Snacks/Orders/Bank/Settings), and PIN authentication dialog. Displays cart item count badge and conditionally shows admin features based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/PinAuthDialog.ts: Modal dialog component for admin PIN authentication with a 4-digit numeric input field. Validates PIN via useAdminAuth hook and shows success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying a snack item with image, name, description, and price. Includes a "View Details" button that navigates to the product detail page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor with optional Internet Identity authentication. Automatically invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Hook for managing admin authentication state using sessionStorage with a hardcoded PIN (8914). Provides authenticate, logout functions and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Hook that generates and persists a unique user ID in localStorage for cart management. Returns the userId string for the current session.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication with AuthClient integration. Manages login state, identity delegation, and provides login/logout functions with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations including fetching snack items, managing cart, checkout, orders, and bank account CRUD operations. All mutations invalidate relevant query caches.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm food truck color theme (orange/yellow/red palette) for both light and dark modes. Uses Poppins and Pacifico fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying company mission, founding year (2026), and three value propositions (Premium Selection, Mobile Convenience, Community First) using cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page for adding new snack items with form inputs (id, name, description, price), image upload functionality, and displays existing snack items and bank account information.
frontend/src/pages/BankInformation.tsx: Bank information management page allowing users to view and update bank account details (account holder name, bank name, account number, routing number) for receiving customer payments.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantities, total price calculation, options to clear cart or proceed to checkout, and handles empty cart state.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page with customer information form (name, email, address, phone), tip selection options (percentage or custom amount), order summary with subtotal/tip/total calculations, and order submission.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays order confirmation details after successful purchase, showing customer information, delivery address, order items with quantities and prices, and calculates subtotal, tip, and total amounts.
frontend/src/pages/OrderManagement.tsx: Admin page that displays all customer orders with full details including customer information, delivery addresses, order items, and pricing breakdown with tip calculations.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Main catalog page displaying hero banner, food truck image, and grid of all available snack items using ProductCard components with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Individual product detail page with image display, quantity selector, and add-to-cart functionality that integrates with the cart system and shows pricing information.
frontend/src/pages/SnackManagement.tsx: Admin page for viewing and deleting snack items from the catalog, displaying items in a grid with images, details, and delete confirmation dialogs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography settings with Poppins and Pacifico fonts, animations, and design tokens for the UI component system.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking image upload bug fix progress, with existing features for ImageUpload component debugging and Admin form integration, plus pending backend blob storage verification.
